title: Use the API to deploy a Workspace Template
excerpt: The new Workspace template feature is great as it allows us to package multiple board templates together, and crucially, create a dashboard template and persist the connections between the board templates and the dashboa…

posts.author: leemurphy (Lee Murphy)
posts.cookedHtml:
The new Workspace template feature is great as it allows us to package multiple board templates together, and crucially, create a dashboard template and persist the connections between the board templates and the dashboard template in the workspace.

We are using an automation with the Monday.com API to create a new Workspace for new customer projects which come through in Salesforce. It would be so valuable for us if the API can be updated to allow us to deploy a workspace template. Currently you can only deploy board templates via the API.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you @leemurphy for bringing this request here!

People can vote at the top of this page!

Cheers,
Matias
